scripts.dev: concurrently -k "npm --prefix frontend run dev" "npm run dev:electron"
scripts.dist:win: npm run build:frontend && electron-builder --config electron\builder.json --win nsis
scripts.dist:nsis: npm run build:frontend && electron-builder --config electron\builder.json --win nsis
scripts.quality:frontend: npm --prefix frontend run typecheck && npm --prefix frontend run lint && npm --prefix frontend run test && npm --prefix frontend run build && npm --prefix frontend run check:bundle && npm --prefix frontend run perf:run && npm --prefix frontend run perf:check
